hypotheses.name: kNN Spectral Gap Monotonic Decrease (195 in-vocab genes)
hypotheses.method: k=10 kNN graph per layer on 195 in-vocab named genes. Normalized Laplacian spectral gap ratio = lambda2/lambda_max via scipy.sparse.linalg.eigsh. Spearman rho(layer, ratio). Compare real vs Gaussian null.
hypotheses.next_action: Test community detection (Louvain/greedy modularity) on kNN graph per layer; compare communities to GO/STRING annotations. Also test if spectral gap correlates with cell-type marker clusters.

hypotheses.name: STRING Score → Embedding Distance (195 in-vocab genes, corrected)
hypotheses.method: STRING PPI pairs (score>=0.4) filtered to 195 in-vocab named genes (n=2592 pairs). L2 embedding distance per pair per layer. Spearman rho(STRING_score, L2_dist) and AUROC (high>=0.7 vs low<0.5 score pairs).
hypotheses.primary_metric: mean Spearman rho(STRING_score, L2_dist) across layers
hypotheses.next_action: Retire STRING→embedding distance direction. Try GO Jaccard similarity → embedding distance instead (iter_0024 showed GO Jaccard promising; now apply to 195 in-vocab genes).
hypotheses.retirement_reason: STRING score does not predict embedding distance at any layer; AUROC~0.49 across all layers on corrected gene set

hypotheses.name: Participation Ratio (Intrinsic Dim) Collapse Across Layers (195 in-vocab genes)
hypotheses.method: For 195 in-vocab genes per layer: mean-center, SVD, participation ratio PR=(sum s^2)^2/(sum s^4). L2 norm CV per layer. Spearman rho(layer, PR) and rho(layer, norm_CV).
hypotheses.result_value: rho=-1.000, p=0.0; PR collapse 58.09→9.53 (6.1x), var_PC1 rises 8%→26%
hypotheses.next_action: Test if PC1 at L11 separates known biological groups (cell-type markers, TF targets). Also compute two-factor model: PR × spectral_gap predicts layer depth with both metrics jointly.
